div.p: This luncheon, at which Mrs. Churchill was hostess and which included also one of Churchill’s secretaries, is noted in Leahy’s Diary (Leahy Papers). No record of the discussion during luncheon has been found.Leahy’s Diary also records a dinner on August 14 and a luncheon on August 24 attended only by military and naval personnel. No record of the discussion is included in the Diary, and as no other source refers to these meetings it is assumed that they were of a social character and they are therefore not further mentioned in this volume.
